name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is owned by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means free *)
(* philosopher state: state[i] ∈ {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ forks ∈ [1..N -> 1..N \/ -1]
  /\ state ∈ [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Helper functions *)
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry"
Eating(i) == state[i] = "eating"
Thinking(i) == state[i] = "thinking"

FreeFork(i) == forks[i] = -1

CanEat(i) == 
  /\ Hungry(i)
  /\ FreeFork(LeftFork(i))
  /\ FreeFork(RightFork(i))

(* Actions *)
Think(i) == 
  /\ Thinking(i)
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

TakeForks(i) == 
  /\ CanEat(i)
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = i, ![RightFork(i)] = i]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutForks(i) == 
  /\ Eating(i)
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = -1, ![RightFork(i)] = -1]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Next == 
  \/ ∃ i ∈ 1..N: Think(i)
  \/ ∃ i ∈ 1..N: TakeForks(i)
  \/ ∃ i ∈ 1..N: PutForks(i)

Init == 
  /\ forks = [i ∈ 1..N |-> -1]
  /\ state = [i ∈ 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>> /\ TypeOK

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES num, flag

(* --algorithm Bakery *)
   VARIABLES num, flag

   Init == /\ num \in [1..N -> 0]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> FALSE]

   Next == \E i \in 1..N:
            /\ flag[i] = FALSE
            /\ flag[i] := TRUE
            /\ num[i] := 1 + Max(num)
            /\ flag[i] := FALSE
            /\ \A j \in 1..N:
                j /= i
                /\ \E k \in 1..N:
                    k /= i
                    /\ k /= j
                    /\ \E l \in 1..N:
                        l /= i
                        /\ l /= j
                        /\ l /= k
                        /\ \E m \in 1..N:
                            m /= i
                            /\ m /= j
                            /\ m /= k
                            /\ m /= l
                            /\ \E n \in 1..N:
                                n /= i
                                /\ n /= j
                                /\ n /= k
                                /\ n /= l
                                /\ n /= m
                                /\ \E o \in 1..N:
                                    o /= i
                                    /\ o /= j
                                    /\ o /= k
                                    /\ o /= l
                                    /\ o /= m
                                    /\ o /= n
                                    /\ \E p \in 1..N:
                                        p /= i
                                        /\ p /= j
                                        /\ p /= k
                                        /\ p /= l
                                        /\ p /= m
                                        /\ p /= n
                                        /\ p /= o
                                        /\ \E q \in 1..N:
                                            q /= i
                                            /\ q /= j

---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



(* --operator
  Server == 1..N
*)

(* --operator
  Majority == (N \div 2) + 1
*)

(* --operator
  TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
           /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Server
           /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}
*)

(* --operator
  Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
         /\ votedFor = None
         /\ state = Follower
*)

(* --operator
  RequestVote(s) == /\ state = Candidate
                    /\ currentTerm = s.currentTerm
                    /\ votedFor = None
                    /\ votedFor' = s.server
*)

(* --operator
  VoteGranted(s) == /\ state = Candidate
                    /\ currentTerm = s.currentTerm
                    /\ votedFor = s.server
*)

(* --operator
  VoteCount(s) == /\ state = Candidate
                  /\ currentTerm = s.currentTerm
                  /\ votedFor = s.server
*)

(* --operator
  BecomeLeader(s) == /\ state = Candidate
                    /\ currentTerm = s.currentTerm
                    /\ votedFor = s.server
                    /\ state' = Leader
*)

(* --operator
  Next == \/ /\ state = Follower
           /\ state' = Candidate
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
           /\ votedFor' = None
        \/ /\ state = Candidate
           /\ votedFor' = None
           /\ state' = Follower
        \/ /\ state = Candidate
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = Leader
*)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>> /\ TypeOK

---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Channels

(* Type checking *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in [1..N -> [localState: Nat, channelState: [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]]]
    /\ markerSent \in [1..N -> [1..N -> BOOLEAN]]
    /\ markerReceived \in [1..N -> [1..N -> BOOLEAN]]
    /\ channelBuffer \in [1..N -> [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]]
    /\ snapshotRecorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: 
        /\ state[i].channelState \in [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]
        /\ markerSent[i] \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ markerReceived[i] \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ channelBuffer[i] \in [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: 
        /\ state[i] = [localState |-> 0, channelState |-> [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]
        /\ markerSent[i] = [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ markerReceived[i] = [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ channelBuffer[i] = [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]
        /\ snapshotRecorded[i] = FALSE

(* Sending a marker along an outgoing channel *)
SendMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ Channels[i] = j
    /\ markerSent[i][j] = FALSE
    /\ channelBuffer[i][j] = Append(channelBuffer[i][j], "marker")
    /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i][j] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, markerReceived, channelBuffer, snapshotRecorded>>

(* Receiving a marker along an incoming channel *)
ReceiveMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ Channels[j] = i
    /\ markerReceived[i][j] = FALSE
    /\ channelBuffer[i][j] = <<>>  (* No marker in buffer *)
    /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![i][j] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, markerSent, channelBuffer, snapshotRecorded>>

(* Recording local state and channel state *)
RecordState(i) ==
    /\ snapshotRecorded[i] = FALSE
    /\ snapshotRecorded' = [snapshotRecorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i].localState = state[i].localState + 1]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i].channelState = [j \in 1..N |-> channelBuffer[i][j]]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<markerSent, markerReceived, channel

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Initial state: all keys map to some default value *)
Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
        /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> defaultValue]

(* Put operation: updates the value for a key *)
Put(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
              /\ v \in Values
              /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Get operation: reads the value for a key *)
Get(k) == /\ k \in Keys
          /\ store' = store

(* Next-state relation: either a Put or a Get *)
Next == \/ \E k \in Keys, v \in Values: Put(k, v)
      \/ \E k \in Keys: Get(k)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ fileData \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ channel \in Seq(1..CHUNK_SIZE)

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ fileData = SubSeq(1..CHUNK_SIZE, 1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channel = <<>>

(* Sending a chunk *)
SendChunk == 
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, SubSeq(fileData, Length(sentChunks)+1, Length(sentChunks)+CHUNK_SIZE))
    /\ channel' = Append(channel, SubSeq(fileData, Length(sentChunks)+1, Length(sentChunks)+CHUNK_SIZE))
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0

(* Retransmitting a chunk *)
RetransmitChunk == 
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ channel' = Append(channel, SubSeq(fileData, Length(sentChunks)+1, Length(sentChunks)+CHUNK_SIZE))
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1

(* Receiving a chunk *)
ReceiveChunk == 
    /\ channel' = SubSeq(channel, 2, Length(channel))
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0

(* Next state *)
Next == 
    \/ /\ Length(sentChunks) < Length(fileData)
       /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, SubSeq(fileData, Length(sentChunks)+1, Length(sentChunks)+CHUNK_SIZE))
       /\ channel' = Append(channel, SubSeq(fileData, Length(sentChunks)+1, Length(sentChunks)+CHUNK_SIZE))
       /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    \/ /\ Length(sentChunks) = Length(fileData)
       /\ channel' = SubSeq(channel, 2, Length(channel))
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    \/ /\ Length(sentChunks) = Length(fileData)
       /\ retransmitCount < MAX_RETRIES
       /\ channel' = Append(channel, SubSeq(fileData, Length(sentChunks)+1, Length(sentChunks)+CHUNK_SIZE))
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileData, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>>

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES db, txns, nextTxId, snapshot
TxState == [id: Nat, status: {"active", "committed", "aborted"},
           readSet: [key: Key, value: Value],
           writeSet: [key: Key, value: Value]]

(* Types *)
Key == Nat
Value == Nat

(* Type predicates *)
TypeOK == /\ db \in [Key -> Value]
          /\ txns \in [Nat -> TxState]
          /\ nextTxId \in Nat
          /\ snapshot \in [Key -> Value]
          /\ \A t \in DOMAIN txns: TxState \in txns[t]
          /\ \A t \in DOMAIN txns: t \in txns[t].id
          /\ \A t \in DOMAIN txns: txns[t].status \in {"active", "committed", "aborted"}
          /\ \A t \in DOMAIN txns: txns[t].readSet \in [Key -> Value]
          /\ \A t \in DOMAIN txns: txns[t].writeSet \in [Key -> Value]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ db = [k \in Key |-> 0]
        /\ txns = [ ]
        /\ nextTxId = 1
        /\ snapshot = [k \in Key |-> 0]

(* Begin a new transaction *)
BeginTx == /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![nextTxId] = [id |-> nextTxId,
                                                   status |-> "active",
                                                   readSet |-> [k \in Key |-> snapshot[k]],
                                                   writeSet |-> [k \in Key |-> 0]]
          /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
          /\ snapshot' = snapshot
          /\ db' = db

(* Read a key within a transaction *)
ReadTx(t, k) == /\ t \in DOMAIN txns
                 /\ txns[t].status = "active"
                 /\ k \in Key
                 /\ txns[t].readSet[k] = snapshot[k]
                 /\ db' = db
                 /\ snapshot' = snapshot
                 /\ txns' = txns

(* Write a key within a transaction *)
WriteTx(t, k, v) == /\ t \in DOMAIN txns
                    /\ txns[t].status = "active"
                    /\ k \in Key
                    /\ v \in Value
                    /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![t].writeSet[k] = v]
                    /\ db' = db

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, epsilon, maxDrift

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == clocks \in [1..N -> Nat]

(* Initial state: all clocks start at 0 *)
Init == clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* Drift: each node's clock may increase by up to maxDrift *)
Drift == \E i \in 1..N:
            \E d \in 0..maxDrift:
                clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = @ + d]

(* Synchronisation: each node updates its clock to the average of all clocks *)
Sync == \E avg \in Nat:
            \E i \in 1..N:
                clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = avg]
            /\ avg = (SUM i \in 1..N: clocks[i]) / N

(* Next state: either drift or synchronise *)
Next == Drift \/ Sync

(* Specification: system runs for one round of drift followed by synchronisation *)
Spec == Init /\ Next

(* Invariant: after one round, all clocks are within epsilon of each other *)
SyncInvariant == \A i, j \in 1..N: Abs(clocks[i] - clocks[j]) <= epsilon

(* TLC configuration *)
CONSTANTS N, epsilon, maxDrift, TypeOK

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId
Topic == [topic: STRING]
Message == [msgId: Nat, topic: STRING, payload: STRING]
SubscriberId == Nat
PublisherId == Nat

(* Helper functions *)
IsTopic(t) == t \in DOMAIN messages
IsSubscriber(s) == s \in DOMAIN subscribers

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
  /\ subscribers = [t \in {} -> {}]
  /\ messages = [t \in {} -> <<>>]
  /\ nextMsgId = 1
  /\ nextSubId = 1

(* Register a new subscriber for a topic *)
Register(subId, topic) ==
  /\ IsTopic(topic)
  /\ subscribers[topic] = subscribers[topic] \cup {subId}

(* Deregister a subscriber from a topic *)
Deregister(subId, topic) ==
  /\ IsTopic(topic)
  /\ subscribers[topic] = subscribers[topic] \ {subId}

(* Post a new message on a topic *)
Post(pubId, topic, payload) ==
  /\ IsTopic(topic)
  /\ LET msg == [msgId |-> nextMsgId, topic |-> topic, payload |-> payload]
     IN /\ messages[topic] = Append(messages[topic], msg)
        /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId + 1
        /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, nextSubId>>

(* Deliver messages to subscribers *)
Deliver(subId, topic) ==
  /\ IsTopic(topic)
  /\ IsSubscriber(subId)
  /\ subscribers[topic] = subscribers[topic] \cup {subId}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ \E subId \in DOMAIN subscribers, topic \in DOMAIN subscribers:
        Register(subId, topic)
  \/ \E subId \in DOMAIN subscribers, topic \in DOMAIN subscribers:
        Deregister(subId, topic)
  \/ \E pubId \in DOMAIN messages, topic \in DOMAIN messages, payload \in STRING:
        Post(pubId, topic, payload)
  \/ \E subId \in DOMAIN subscribers, topic \in DOMAIN subscribers:
        Deliver(subId, topic)

(* Specification *)
Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ subscribers \in [Topic -> SUBSET SubscriberId]
  /\ messages \in [Topic -> Seq(Message)]
  /\ nextMsgId \in Nat
  /\ next

---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES turn, wants

(* --algorithm Dekker *)
   VARIABLES turn, wants
   turn \in {0,1}
   wants \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]
   Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
          /\ wants \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]
   Next == \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
           /\ wants[1] = FALSE
           /\ turn' = 0
           /\ wants' = [0 |-> FALSE, 1 |-> FALSE]
        \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
           /\ wants[1] = TRUE
           /\ turn' = 1
           /\ wants' = [0 |-> FALSE, 1 |-> TRUE]
        \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
           /\ wants[1] = FALSE
           /\ turn' = 0
           /\ wants' = [0 |-> TRUE, 1 |-> FALSE]
        \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
           /\ wants[1] = TRUE
           /\ turn' = turn
           /\ wants' = [0 |-> TRUE, 1 |-> TRUE]
   Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn,wants>>
   Safety == \A i \in {0,1} : \A j \in {0,1} : (i # j) => (wants[i] = FALSE \/ wants[j] = FALSE)
   Liveness == \A i \in {0,1} : (wants[i] = TRUE) => <> (wants[i] = FALSE)
   TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0,1}
            /\ wants \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]
   Invariant == Safety /\ Liveness
   Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn,wants>> /\ Invariant
   ====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Node

VARIABLES counts

(* TypeOK ensures that counts is a function from Node to a function from Node to Nat *)
TypeOK == counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]

(* Init: all counts are zero *)
Init == counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

(* Increment: node n increments its own slot *)
Increment(n) == counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][n] = @ + 1]

(* Merge: element-wise max *)
Merge(n, m) ==
  counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][k] = Max(@, counts[m][k]) : k \in Node]

(* Next: either an increment or a merge *)
Next == \E n \in Node : Increment(n) \lor \E m \in Node : Merge(n, m)

(* Total count: sum over all nodes of the max over each column *)
Total == \Sum n \in Node : \Max_{m \in Node} counts[m][n]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts

====
